title: Rebuild congress for Discord thread debates

log.context: Rebuild congress for Discord thread debates

Done. Here's a summary of what changed:

**`/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/activities/congress_act.py`**

- Added `_discord_headers()` helper for bot auth.
- New `congress_create_thread` activity: POSTs to the Discord threads endpoint on the triggering message, returns the thread `id`.
